title: FactoryLM CLF Correction Event v1
description: An IMMUTABLE human review action. Append-only: a revision is a new event linking to prior_correction_id, never an edit. Regions are referenced by factorylm.visual-region.v1 region_id — this schema NEVER redefines geometry (requirement 1).

region_refs.description: region_id of factorylm.visual-region.v1 instances the reviewer drew/adjusted (owned by mira-bots/shared/visual, #2843/#2846). Linked, never inlined.

prior_correction_id.description: append-only chain; null for the first
